text: - **`providers_menu.rs`** — merged list+actions Select (pick a configured provider → Edit/Test connection/Remove), "+ Add provider" filtered to unconfigured ones only, masked secrets (`sk-or-…4f2a`), dependent-role warning before removing a provider, and a "assign a role now?" bridge into Models right after adding [...] - **`theme.rs`** — one accent (cyan, ANSI-256 `45`), success/error/muted, chosen to hold contrast on both light and dark backgrounds [...] | Accent (prompt ?, pointer, answers) | 45 #00d7ff | 31 #0087af | [...] Theme selection: OSC 11 background query (terminal-light crate), fallback to dark palette (its colors were chosen to stay ≥3:1 on white too), TENEX_EDGE_THEME override, NO_COLOR honored. Cyan accent matches the existing ratatui picker. No emoji; ASCII degrade (>, ok:, error:, -\|/) when locale isn't UTF-8. [...] 3. **Confirm-before-write is a semantic summary, not a JSON diff**: `edge-distillation → qwen2.5:7b (ollama)  was: mistral:7b`, default Yes; answering No returns to the previous prompt with state intact. Atomic writes, unknown JSON keys round-tripped, secrets always shown truncated (`sk-or-…4f2a`) everywhere including receipts and errors. Removing a provider warns which roles break but leaves them visibly dangling rather than auto-deleting.
